A candid documentary-style photograph of a small roadside tea stall during light rain in rural Karnataka, India. A middle-aged shopkeeper wearing a faded blue sweater is carefully repairing an old red transistor radio with a screwdriver while simultaneously serving tea. On the counter are scattered handwritten Kannada notes, a half-open toolbox, a cracked green thermos, and a vintage wall clock showing 4:17 PM. A wet brown dog is sleeping under a wooden bench. Rain droplets are visible on the camera lens. In the background, a yellow school bus passes through muddy roads. MASTER QUALITY BENCHMARK TEST

Create an ultra-photorealistic cinematic image that pushes the image generation model to its maximum capability.

SCENE:

A futuristic mega-city during a heavy rainstorm at blue hour, viewed from a high rooftop observation deck.

In the foreground:

A highly detailed woman wearing a transparent raincoat made of wet clear plastic material, standing beside a futuristic black hypercar.

The hypercar is covered in thousands of realistic rain droplets with accurate reflections and refractions.

The woman is holding a transparent umbrella with visible water droplets, fingerprints, tiny scratches, and realistic optical distortion through the umbrella surface.

Her skin should contain:

• visible pores
• micro skin texture
• tiny facial hairs
• realistic eyelashes
• natural subsurface scattering
• realistic eye moisture
• accurate reflections in the pupils

Her clothing should show:

• fabric stitching
• wrinkles
• water absorption
• realistic folds
• wet fabric physics

MIDGROUND:

A busy futuristic street with:

• hundreds of unique pedestrians
• flying vehicles
• holographic advertisements
• neon signs
• restaurants
• glass skyscrapers
• autonomous vehicles

Every pedestrian must have unique clothing and body proportions.

BACKGROUND:

Massive cyberpunk skyline extending to the horizon.

Include:

• thousands of illuminated windows
• distant traffic
• atmospheric fog
• volumetric light shafts
• realistic weather effects
• lightning in distant clouds

LIGHTING:

Complex multi-source lighting.

Include:

• neon reflections
• car headlights
• holographic glow
• ambient city light
• realistic shadow interaction
• global illumination
• ray-traced reflections
• ray-traced refractions

MATERIALS TEST:

Accurately render:

• glass
• chrome
• carbon fiber
• wet asphalt
• skin
• leather
• plastic
• water
• metal
• fabric

CAMERA:

Shot on a professional full-frame cinema camera.

Lens:
85mm
f/1.8

Effects:

• cinematic depth of field
• realistic bokeh
• filmic contrast
• HDR imaging
• natural motion blur
• ultra-high dynamic range

QUALITY REQUIREMENTS:

No AI artifacts.

No duplicated people.

No malformed anatomy.

No extra fingers.

No broken reflections.

No distorted vehicles.

No floating objects.

No blurry faces.

No unrealistic textures.

Preserve global consistency across the entire image.

Render at maximum possible detail.

Every object must remain physically plausible.

Every reflection must match the scene.

Every shadow must have a correct light source.

The image should look indistinguishable from a real professional photograph captured in the real world.

Award-winning photography.
Museum-quality realism.
Extreme detail.
Maximum fidelity.
Maximum visual complexity.
